---
title: "Marketing Projects"
description: "Blog-style case studies for digital marketing and marketing analytics projects."
listing:
  contents: listings
  type: grid
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  page-size: 8
---

The projects below show how I approach digital marketing work: start with a business question, select relevant metrics, analyze performance data, and recommend next actions. The sample projects use simulated or class-created data and should be replaced with your own course, internship, or client work when available.

For the professor's template structure, the main auto-gallery also appears on [Marketing Analytics](marketing-analytics.html), while brand and positioning work appears on [Strategic Marketing](strategic-marketing.html).

::: {.callout-note}
## Portfolio Positioning

For a digital marketing role, emphasize campaign planning, content decisions, channel execution, and creative testing. For a marketing analytics role, emphasize data preparation, KPI design, dashboarding, and recommendations from performance metrics.
:::
